  SVN rev 180319 on 2008-07-06 10:21:12Z by mtm

    of the message, such as:
      Jun 30 10:49:21 rogue sshd[17553]: Invalid user iceman from 127.0.0.1
  
    PR: conf/124569
    Submitted by: Taku <taku@tekipaki.jp>
